title: Ivy's Sound Counting Adventure
synopsis: Little Ivy discovers sounds all around her and counts them in this sensory adventure filled with musical notes, animal sounds, and everyday noises.

pages.text: This is Ivy! She loves to listen to sounds.

illustration.description: A cheerful little girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes standing in a colorful garden with swirling rainbow sound waves floating around her like ribbons
illustration.alt: Ivy surrounded by colorful sound waves

pages.text: ONE bird goes tweet! The sound looks like yellow dots dancing in the air.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes looking up at a blue bird on a tree branch, with bright yellow dots floating and sparkling around the bird
illustration.alt: Ivy watching a bird with yellow sound dots

pages.text: TWO cats go meow! Their sounds are purple zigzags.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes sitting on grass with two orange cats, surrounded by purple zigzag lines bouncing playfully in the air
illustration.alt: Ivy with two cats and purple zigzag sounds

pages.text: THREE dogs go woof! Big orange circles bounce everywhere!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes in a park with three playful dogs of different sizes, large bouncing orange circles filling the sky around them
illustration.alt: Ivy with three dogs and orange circle sounds

pages.text: The wind goes whoosh! It makes long blue wavy lines that flow like water.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes standing in a field with her hair gently blowing, surrounded by flowing blue wavy lines that curve and dance like ribbons in the breeze
illustration.alt: Ivy with flowing blue wind sound lines

pages.text: A bell goes ding! It creates tiny silver stars that twinkle and shine.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes holding a small golden bell, with sparkling silver star shapes twinkling and floating around her like magical fairy dust
illustration.alt: Ivy with bell and twinkling silver star sounds

pages.text: Ivy claps her hands! Pink bubbles float up to the sky. What sounds do you hear?

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes clapping her hands with joy, surrounded by floating pink bubble shapes rising upward, with a big smile on her face
illustration.alt: Ivy clapping with pink bubble sounds floating up

metadata.illustrationStyle: sound made visible, wavy lines for music, jagged lines for crashes, dots for whispers, synesthesia inspired, seeing sound, color and shape for noise, vibration visual

questions.question: How many birds made tweet sounds?
questions.explanation: ONE bird went tweet and made yellow dots!

questions.question: What color were the cat sounds?
questions.explanation: The cats' meow sounds were purple zigzags!

questions.question: What did Ivy do at the end?
questions.explanation: Ivy clapped her hands and made pink bubble sounds!
